rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §37.0831, which governs school district dating violence policies. No overlap in subject matter, authority, or fiscal mechanism.
quote: Each school district shall adopt and implement a dating violence policy to be included in the district improvement plan under Section 11.252.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text addresses dating violence policies in schools; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions. No statutory or operational intersection.
